---
title: The HackEPS website
abstract: The website for the HackEPS, the hackathon at UdL
categories: University project
image: "/imgs/lleidahack_logo.png"
author: 
    - name: The LleidaHack association
      url: https://www.linkedin.com/company/lleidahack
---

<img src="/imgs/lleidahack_title.png" width=600 align=center class="imgs">

<p></p>

# Description

The HackEPS website contains the information, registration procedure and everything related to Lleida's first hackathon, the HackEPS.
It was made by the LleidaHack developers team.

## Development process

When I started in LleidaHack's developer team, I worked on the frontend, refactoring and creating some of the components. Then, I transitioned to the backend where I created some models and worked on the API.

It was also my first colaborative project, where I learnt production-based workflows and tools like Git and GitHub.

## Technologies used

![JavaScript](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/javascript/javascript-original.svg){width=60}
![Python](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/python/python-original-wordmark.svg){width=60}
![React](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/react/react-original-wordmark.svg){width=60}
![FastAPI](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/fastapi/fastapi-original.svg){width=60}
![TailwindCSS](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/tailwindcss/tailwindcss-original.svg){width=60}
![Docker](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/docker/docker-plain-wordmark.svg){width=60}
![npm](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/npm/npm-original-wordmark.svg){width=60}
![GitHub](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon@latest/icons/github/github-original-wordmark.svg){width=60}
